狂浪音乐祭 Loud Music Festival Asia 2026

Sat, Jul 18 · 10:00 AM
The Arch Galeries
<p><img src="https://tm-prod-event-files-v3.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/29b9cec0689211f1943101117567899b/description/e4dcc31c68a711f1923401117567899b.png" style="width: 645px;" class="fr-fic fr-dib"></p><p><img src="https://tm-prod-event-files-v3.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/29b9cec0689211f1943101117567899b/description/3b55194268b011f1911101117567899b.jpeg" style="width: 650px;" class="fr-fic fr-dib"></p><p><strong>VVIP Sofa Packages</strong></p><p>📍 XOX Arena, The Arch Galeries, Kuala Lumpur<br>📅 Saturday, 18 July 2026<br>⏰ 6:00 PM &ndash; 12:00 AM</p><p>Experience Loud Music Festival Asia from the best seats in the house.</p><p>Located on both sides of the Loud Stage, VVIP Sofa Packages offer premium viewing, dedicated service, fast-track entry, and curated bottle packages for groups of up to 8 guests.</p><p>Whether you&#39;re celebrating with friends, entertaining clients, or simply looking for the most comfortable festival experience, our VVIP area combines the energy of a live music festival with the exclusivity of a private hospitality suite.</p><p><strong>Package Includes</strong></p><p>✅ Private VVIP Sofa for 8 Guests<br>✅ 8x Festival Admissions<br>✅ Dedicated VVIP Entry Lane<br>✅ Premium Bottle Package Selection<br>✅ Complimentary Mixers &amp; Mineral Water<br>✅ Access to VVIP Bar &amp; Service Team<br>✅ Complimentary Valet Parking Pass<br>✅ Festival Snack Platter<br>✅ Exclusive VVIP Festival Gift Pack</p><p><strong>Performing Live</strong></p><p>🎤 周湯豪 NICKTHEREAL<br>🎤 高爾宣 OSN<br>🎤 承桓 Cheng Huan<br>🎤 Hovy Lee 李麦诚<br>🎤 苡慧 Yihuik</p><p><strong>Important Information</strong></p><ul><li>Each VVIP Sofa package admits up to 8 guests.</li><li>Guests must be aged 21 and above to consume alcoholic beverages.</li><li>Management reserves the right to request valid identification.</li><li>Bottle package selections are subject to availability and may be substituted with products of equivalent value where necessary.</li><li>Festival schedule and performance times will be released closer to the event date.</li><li>For VVIP enquiries, please contact:<br>📞 +60 16-805 5140<br>📧 hello@loudmusicfestival.asia</li></ul>
